steps.title: Put the equation in standard form
steps.content:
Expand both sides, then move all terms to one side:
$x(x+5)-176=3x(x-11)$
$x^2+5x-176=3x^2-33x$
$2x^2-38x+176=0$
$x^2-19x+88=0$

steps.title: Use the sum of roots
steps.content: For $ax^2+bx+c=0$, the sum of the solutions is $-\frac{b}{a}$. Here, $a=1$ and $b=-19$, so $-\frac{-19}{1}=19$. The answer is D.
